Title: Pledging Another $400,000 to the Zig Software Foundation
Description:
My family is pledging another $400,0001 to the
Zig Software Foundation (ZSF). This brings
our total pledged support for ZSF to $700,000, after our
initial donation in 2024.

Title: Never Give Them Your Face

Title: Everything you say CAN and WILL be used against you
